summary: Enhanced Brief Me feature testing complete. All core features verified working: API returns success with news headlines/themes/sentiment (from Finnhub fallback), sector rotation data (leaders/laggards/rotation_signal), and catalysts extracted from news. Frontend modal opens correctly, displays quick summary with News Tone badge, Top Sector badge, Catalyst badge, Themes row. Toggle to detailed view works showing News & Catalysts, Sector Rotation, Your Bot Status, and Recommendation sections. PERFORMANCE ISSUE: Quick response ~15s (good), but Detailed response ~52s (exceeds 40s target).

minor.issue: Detailed view response time ~52s, exceeds 40s target. Quick view is 15s which is acceptable.

features_verified.sector_rotation_laggards: PASS - Returns bottom 3 sector ETFs (XLU, XLRE, XLB) with change_pct

action_items: PERFORMANCE: Detailed view response time ~52s exceeds 40s target. Consider: (1) caching news/sector data, (2) reducing parallel API calls, (3) timeout adjustments for individual data fetches
critical_code_review_comments: brief_me_agent.py correctly implements parallel data fetching with _safe_fetch wrapper and timeouts
news_service.py properly falls back to Finnhub when IB Gateway unavailable
_fetch_sector_rotation uses Alpaca get_quotes_batch for sector ETF data
BriefMeModal.jsx correctly renders quick summary with badges and detailed view with sections

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 failed due to 52s response time > 40s limit)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Brief Me modal features verified

mocked_apis.note: IB Gateway not connected in test environment - Finnhub fallback provides real news data

context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Brief Me feature fully functional. News comes from Finnhub (IB Gateway fallback). Sector data from Alpaca. Quick response ~15s (good), detailed ~52s (needs optimization). All frontend modal features working including quick/detailed toggle.
